asr_es: Señoras y señores diputados, se abre la sesión. De conformidad con el artículo 66 del reglamento del Parlamento, debo proceder a la siguiente comunicación. De acuerdo con el apartado 2 del artículo 251 del tratado CE, el Consejo me ha informado de que adoptaba la posición del Parlamento aprobada en primera lectura el 22 de abril del 2004, con vistas a la adopción de la decisión del Parlamento Europeo y del Consejo, por la que se modifica la decisión 2000-819-CE relativa al programa plurianual en favor de la empresa y el espíritu empresarial en parte de la decisión del Parlamento Europeo. Y en particular para las pequeñas y medianas empresas, PYME 2001-2005-2003-0292-COD. El acto queda, por tanto, aprobado y he procedido, junto con el presidente del Consejo, a la firma del mismo de conformidad con el artículo 68 de nuestro reglamento. Debo también comunicarles que considero que el Parlamento Europeo en la fecha 20 de julio del 2004, los señores diputados Mario Borghezio, Enrico Speroni, Mateo Salvani y Humberto Bossi han adherido al Grupo Independencia y Democracia. Señoras y señores diputados, debemos proceder a continuación a la aprobación del orden del día. No existe ninguna modificación, de modo que el Parlamento Europeo no ha permitido que el orden del día permanece inalterado. Me señalan que hay una cuestión de orden que va a plantear el señor Hans-Peter Martin, que tiene la palabra para ello.
hypothesis_en: Ladies and gentlemen, the sitting is opened. Pursuant to Rule 66 of Parliament's Rules of Procedure, I have the following communication to make. Pursuant to Article 251 (2) of the EC Treaty, the Council has informed me that it is adopting Parliament's position adopted at first reading on 22 April 2004 with a view to adopting the decision of the European Parliament and of the Council amending Decision 2000-819-EC on the multiannual programme in favour of enterprise and entrepreneurship as part of the European Parliament's decision.
reference_en: good morning Honourable (1.17) Members I declare the sitting open (2.11) (1.14) in (1.01) accordance with article sixty-six of the Parliament's Rules of Procedure I have to make the following communication (1.82) in accordance with paragraph two of article two hundred and fifty-one of the EC Treaty the Council (1.36) has informed me (1.44) that it is adopting the Parliament's position approved in first reading on twenty-second of April two thousand and four with a view to the adoption of the decision of the European Parliament and of the Council (1.62) modifying decision two thousand stroke eight one nine stroke EC relating to the multi-annual programme for business and business spirit in particular for small and medium sized enterprises two thousand and one to two thousand and five two thousand and three stroke zero two nine two COD this act is thereby approved and together with the President office of the Council I have signed this legal act in accordance with article sixty-eight of the Rules of this House (2.53) I must also inform you that as of the twentieth of July two thousand and four Honourable Members Mario Borghezio Enrico Speroni Matteo Salvini and Umberto Bossi have joined the group named Independence and Democracy (1.02) (3.02) now (1.04) Honourable Members (1.12) we have to adopt the agenda for this morning there are no changes (1.37) so the order of business remains unchanged (1.56) (1.84) a point of order from Hans-Peter Martin I give him the floor
